name: datadog_csi_driver
explanation: Datadog's own CSI driver exposes Prometheus metrics on a fixed endpoint. The check inherits OpenMetricsBaseCheckV2 with a hardcoded default of http://localhost:5000/metrics, and the existing auto_conf.yaml templates this as http://%%host%%:5000/metrics with the `csi-driver` AD identifier. Single canonical port and path, no auth — generic OpenMetrics port-scan applies cleanly.
notes: Pattern A: OpenMetrics on a known port. Identical shape to datadog_cluster_agent.
